arts.ttl: Leicester vs Everton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: A huge game beckons at the King Power Stadium as two winless Premier League sides face off in Leicester and Everton. Dominic Calvert-Lewin, James Tarkowski and Michael Keane should all be okay to feature at the King Power, with Vitaliy Mykolenko also likely to make his return having missed Everton's previous two defeats through illness.

arts.ttl: Everton ‘pursuing contract talks’ with player who has been at the club for eight years
arts.sum: Everton don’t want to lose Dominic Calvert-Lewin at the end of the season. The 27-year-old striker is into his contract’s final nine months and failure to extend his terms would see the Toffees lose him for free in the summer. arts.ttl: “It’s an interesting one” – Worldwide rap superstar could be part of sensational Everton takeover
arts.sum: The 2024/25 Premier League season hasn’t provided much respite from the madness that appears to be going on behind the scenes at Everton Football Club. arts.ttl: Steve Cooper's antagonistic stance may help Leicester City restore points deduction injustice - Jordan Blackwell - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Plus, Cooper, having not been the man to lift City into the Premier League, knows he’s got a long way to go to earn the love of the supporters, and it’s probably true for a fair few players too. While it’s ultimately brilliant news for the club’s survival hopes that one possible source of a points deduction has been blocked, it also meant, for a brief while, that City were no longer in opposition to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Everton boss Sean Dyche explains why he won't rush Jarrad Branthwaite's comeback
arts.sum: Jarrad Branthwaite has been out since having a groin operation in the summer and Everton have conceded 13 goals in their first four Premier League games without the England centre-half
